channel.title: neo4j on Geoff Dixon > Write-Verbose
channel.description: Recent content in neo4j on Geoff Dixon > Write-Verbose

item.title: Neo4J CMDB pt1 - MEMCM Export
item.description: This is the first post in a series on creating a graph database CMDB. In part one we’ll cover exporting computer information from Microsoft Endpoint Configuration Manager (a.k.a SCCM) using PowerShell and T-SQL. MEMCM is one datasource used to create a configuration management database (CMDB) using a Neo4j graph database. Why a graph database? I’ll cover this in a future post, but in simple terms, relationships are the key strength of a graph DB and this is well suited to the CMDB use case.
